title: Stupid Music Disks
description: A resource pack that replaces the songs in the current music discs with new ones that i like.
body:
A resource pack which replaces the currently exsisting music discs with songs that I like, I made this using a template which you can find [here.](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/template-music-resource-pack-template-for-easy-modification/)

List of songs added:
Squidward Yell 2
Daisy Bell
Amazing Grace
Birdly Theme (toby fox)
Birdly (rejected concept) (toby fox)
Welcome to Los Santos (feat Kokane) (Oh No)
Virtual Insanity (Jamiroquai)
115 (Elena Siegman)
Death By Glamour (toby fox)
Loonboon (Laura Shigihara)
Zombies on your lawn (Laura Shigihara)
Dont Tap The Glass (ai ver)
Tamale (Tyler The Creator)
DAN DA DAN Opening (Creepy Nuts)
Cursed Woody Sings A Song
Hammer Of Justice (toby fox)
Its TV Time! (toby fox)
The Housebuilding Song (David Ferguson)
Im Not That Innocent (block 13)
Grannys House (FGTEEV)
The Legend (sopngebob patrick)

**I DO NOT OWN ANY OF THESE SONGS, ALL SONGS ARE MADE BY THEIR ORIGINAL CREATORS WHICH I LISTED IN THE SONG LIST. I AM ONLY ADDING THEIR SONGS TO MINECRAFT FOR FUN.**
